measures.title: IPMA and municipal alerts
measures.desc: Subscribe to IPMA weather warnings and your municipality’s channels (SMS/app).

measures.title: Flood and coastal alerts
measures.desc: Follow APA and Civil Protection warnings; set personal thresholds (e.g. cumulative rainfall).

measures.title: 48-hour heat plan
measures.desc: Hydration, outdoor timing, cool spaces (day centres/AC), check in with your support network.

measures.title: Evacuation and safe routes
measures.desc: Know alternate routes; keep fuel and documents ready; follow authority orders.

measures.title: Raise belongings and cut power
measures.desc: Move items to upper floors; switch off electricity if water enters; do not walk or drive through flood water.

measures.title: Emergency kit and contacts
measures.desc: Water, medication, documents, charger, list of trusted contacts.

measures.title: Insurance and inventory
measures.desc: Review multi-risk cover; photograph belongings; store policies in the cloud.

measures.title: Improve home thermal comfort
measures.desc: Shade windows, cross-ventilation, insulation; consider heat pump with available grants.

measures.title: Barriers and damp-proofing
measures.desc: Non-return valves, raise critical equipment, drainage around the property.

measures.title: Support network and climate literacy
measures.desc: Neighbourhood networks; Civil Protection training; save water during droughts.
